meaning: adj.会传染的,有传染性的,影响别人的,感染别人的
examples: It is transmitted between animals and humans by the bite of infected fleas, direct contact, inhalation and rarely, ingestion of infective materials.
The total infective rate of cryptosporidium parvum was low in this area.
Symptoms appear 3—14 days after the infective bite.
The biodefense research may benefit Diversa's efforts to develop anti-infective drugs and take them to market.
Tropical countries are plagued by ecological conditions that produce hundreds of infective bites per year per person.
